notes: I haven't heard music or sounds, but I believe this might be not a Proton issue. Everything else works perfectly.
title: King of Dragon Pass

notes: Game starts to black screen and seconds later closes without any errors.
title: King of Dragon Pass

notes: Shows a black window, then closes after a few seconds.
title: King of Dragon Pass

notes:
To get sound to work, I had to install Windows Media Player 11 based on these instructions: https://askubuntu.com/questions/652424/windows-media-player-11-12-with-wine?noredirect=1&lq=1.  Even with the fix, however, there is crackling/stuttering.  I tried the following to get rid of the stuttering, to no avail:
1. xact
2. PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC=60
3. Changing default-fragment-size-msec to 5 in /etc/pulse/daemon.conf
4. FAudio builds for Proton: https://github.com/Kron4ek/FAudio-Builds
5. Killing Pulseaudio altogether and using pure ALSA

In addition, there was twice when the tutorial would not advance after completing a step, forcing me to repeat it.  However, it seems likely that this is a bug with the game itself and not related to Proton.
title: King of Dragon Pass

notes: Game starts and seems to run fine (only did some tutorial stuff). However, there is no music or sound. Another (non-Linux) user reported that the "Windows Feature Media Pack" needs to be installed: https://steamcommunity.com/app/352220/discussions/0/1620599015894589144/ . However, I don't know how to do fix that using Proton. Asking for a refund now.
title: King of Dragon Pass
